sections.paragraph:
Original: יוב

Transliteration: yôb

Phonetic: yobe

BDB Definition:

Job = "persecuted"
  1. the 3rd son of Issachar also called 'Jashub'

Origin: perhaps a form of H3103, but more probably by erroneous transcription for H3437

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
